security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; connect-src 'self' https: ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: KeeNet — free cross-platform password manager compatible with KeePass (.kdbx).
